Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9n3hm","text":"Calibrated micropipettes (100 μL, 200 μL, and 1000 μL)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3hdul","text":"Pippette tips","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2r490","text":"1.5-mL Eppendorf tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"353nj","text":"5-mm SampleJet NMR tubes (Bruker)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"buntk","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a3sen","text":"Vortex mixer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dnja8","text":"Speed-vac concentrator","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 600 µL of 100% cold methanol to 300 µL of samples On ice Use 1.5-mL Eppendorf tubes Keep methanol cold On ice
Centrifuge the samples at 4 °C at 16000 rcf, °C, for 00:30:00
Transfer the supernatants to new 1.5-mL Eppendorf tubes
Dry the samples in a speed-vac concentrator Overnight, (time varies depending on the sample condition) Store dried samples at -80 °C until the following step if needed
Thaw the samples On ice or in 4 °C
Add 600 µL of the phosphate buffer to each sample
Thaw samples On ice or at 4 °C
Transfer 580 µL to 5-mm NMR tubes No stickers/labels on the caps and tubes allowed
creator: NAN-KB UGA
